name: Color Grade (Lift/Gamma/Gain + HSV)
description: Reproducible twin of create_color_grade: a linear TOP grading chain — a Level TOP does brightness/gamma/contrast/black-level, then an HSV Adjust TOP does saturation and hue. A synthetic horizontal rampTOP stands in as the source so it previews offline; swap it for a selectTOP pointing at real footage. Every grading knob is exposed as a live control. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; live-cook-validated on TD 099 build 2025.32820.

nodes.name: source
nodes.comment: Synthetic gradient source — swap for a selectTOP / moviefileinTOP to grade real content.

preview_description: A horizontal color ramp pushed warmer and more saturated with a touch of added contrast — a clean grading chain with brightness, gamma, contrast, saturation and hue on live knobs.
